entity.name: Explosion Proof Tablets Reference
entity.description: Independent comparison of ATEX and IECEx certified Zone 1 and Zone 2 tablets for hazardous areas.

claims.claim: As of June 2026, there is no widely available ATEX or IECEx Zone 1 certified Ex case for any iPad model.
Dedicated ATEX Zone 1 and Zone 2 Android tablets from vendors like ecom and i.safe MOBILE are priced between €2,400 and €4,500 excluding VAT.

Zone 1 tablets are certified for areas where explosive atmospheres are likely during normal operation. Zone 2 tablets are only rated for areas where explosive atmospheres are not expected but may occur briefly. Zone 1 devices can always be used in Zone 2, but not vice versa.
Xshielder offers ATEX Zone 1 certified Ex cases for the iPhone 17 Pro Max. For organisations needing Apple ecosystem devices in hazardous areas, this is the only available Zone 1 certified option.
The ecom Tab-Ex 03 DZ2 is the industry standard for Zone 1 Android tablets, built on Samsung Galaxy Tab hardware with ATEX and IECEx dual certification.
